adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `GitClone` DSC resource is used to clone a Git repository to a local directory.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether the repository should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.
        Removing a cloned repository is not supported by this resource.

HttpsUrl.title: HttpsUrl
HttpsUrl.description: The HTTPS URL of the Git repository to clone. This is a key property.

RemoteName.title: RemoteName
RemoteName.description: The name of the remote. Defaults to `origin`.

RootDirectory.title: RootDirectory
RootDirectory.description: The root directory where the repository will be cloned into. This is a mandatory property.

FolderName.title: FolderName
FolderName.description: The folder name for the cloned repository. If not specified, it is derived from the HTTPS URL.

ExtraArgs.title: ExtraArgs
ExtraArgs.description: Additional arguments to pass to `git clone`.

embedded.description: The `GitClone` DSC resource is used to clone a Git repository to a local directory.
embedded.title: GitDsc/GitClone

adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `GitRemote` DSC resource is used to manage remote repository references in a Git project.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the remote should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.

RemoteName.title: RemoteName
RemoteName.description: The name of the Git remote. This is a key property.

RemoteUrl.title: RemoteUrl
RemoteUrl.description: The URL of the Git remote. This is a key property.

ProjectDirectory.title: ProjectDirectory
ProjectDirectory.description: The path to the local Git repository. This is a mandatory property.

embedded.description: The `GitRemote` DSC resource is used to manage remote repository references in a Git project.
embedded.title: GitDsc/GitRemote

adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `GitConfigUserName` DSC resource is used to manage the Git user name configuration.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the user name should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.

UserName.title: UserName
UserName.description: The Git user name to configure. This is a key property.

ConfigLocation.title: ConfigLocation
ConfigLocation.description: The Git configuration scope to apply the setting to (e.g., `global`, `system`, `local`).

ProjectDirectory.title: ProjectDirectory
ProjectDirectory.description: The path to the Git repository. Required for non-global and non-system configurations.

embedded.description: The `GitConfigUserName` DSC resource is used to manage the Git user name configuration.
embedded.title: GitDsc/GitConfigUserName

adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `GitConfigUserEmail` DSC resource is used to manage the Git user email configuration.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the user email should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.

UserEmail.title: UserEmail
UserEmail.description: The Git user email to configure. This is a key property.

ConfigLocation.title: ConfigLocation
ConfigLocation.description: The Git configuration scope to apply the setting to (e.g., `global`, `system`, `local`).

ProjectDirectory.title: ProjectDirectory
ProjectDirectory.description: The path to the Git repository. Required for non-global and non-system configurations.

embedded.description: The `GitConfigUserEmail` DSC resource is used to manage the Git user email configuration.
embedded.title: GitDsc/GitConfigUserEmail
